citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The IACUC has not formally documented inspection of the animal facilities and reviewed the facility's program for humane
care and use of animals. At least once every six months, the IACUC must review the faculty's program for humane care
and use of animals and inspect all the animal facilities where animals are housed or used. A prepared report of its
evaluations must be created and sent to the Institutional Official of the research facility as well as be available to an
APHIS official at time of inspection. IACUC reviews and inspections assure the well being and proper care of all the
animals.
*****Correct from this day, May 8, 2026, forward.

The research facility did not submit their USDA FY 25 Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or before the
extended deadline due date of 12/31/25.
Research facilities that use or intend to use live animals in research, tests, experiments, or for teaching shall submit an
annual report, that covers the numbers of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year. Timely submission of the
annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total number of animals used and to ensure that
professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the previous Federal
fiscal year reporting period.
Correct by submitting the FY 2025 Annual Report by May 20, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The IACUC has not formally documented inspection of the animal facilities and reviewed the facility's program for humane 
care and use of animals. At least once every six months, the IACUC must review the faculty's program for humane care 
and use of animals and inspect all the animal facilities where animals are housed or used. A prepared report of its 
evaluations must be created and sent to the Institutional Official of the research facility as well as be available to an 
APHIS official at time of inspection. IACUC reviews and inspections assure the well being and proper care of all the 
animals. 
*****Correct from this day, May 8, 2026, forward. 
2.36(a)  Repeat
   
Annual report. 
The research facility did not submit their USDA FY 25 Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or before the 
extended deadline due date of 12/31/25. 
Research facilities that use or intend to use live animals in research, tests, experiments, or for teaching shall submit an 
annual report, that covers the numbers of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year. Timely submission of the 
annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total number of animals used and to ensure that 
professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the previous Federal 
fiscal year reporting period. 
Correct by submitting the FY 2025 Annual Report by May 20, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
